prompt:
A concise Linux command cheatsheet page laid on a workstation desk beside a keyboard and terminal window glow, showing a compact reference layout with grouped commands and usage examples. The sheet should look practical and frequently consulted, with a few highlighted sections and fold marks, but no legible text so it remains an icon rather than a literal document scan.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a near-future ops-workstation aesthetic: soft desk lighting, realistic paper and keyboard textures, no logos, no readable words, and no identifiable faces. Keep the cheatsheet centered and uncluttered so it reads instantly as a DSPACE sysadmin reference artifact.
